dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Another day. Another sunrise I barely registered through the blinds.

dialogue.speaker: Shin-Ae
dialogue.line: (Thought) Ugh. My alarm. Or what's left of it. It's probably past noon. School's definitely out of the question.

dialogue.speaker: Shin-Ae
dialogue.line: (Thought) My stomach's doing its usual opera. I wonder if there's any instant ramen left. Or maybe just... stale bread.

dialogue.speaker: Shin-Ae
dialogue.line: Dad?

dialogue.speaker: Shin-Ae's Dad
dialogue.line: (Coughing) Just resting, kiddo. Don't worry about me.

dialogue.speaker: Shin-Ae
dialogue.line: (Thought) Right. 'Don't worry.' As if I have a choice. Being broke isn't exactly a luxury.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: PHONE VIBRATE

dialogue.speaker: Shin-Ae
dialogue.line: (Thought) Rika. What does she want now? Probably to drag me to some 'fun' event where I'll feel even more out of place.

dialogue.speaker: Shin-Ae
dialogue.line: Hello?

dialogue.speaker: Rika
dialogue.line: Shin-Ae! You finally picked up! Where are you? You missed school again!

dialogue.speaker: Shin-Ae
dialogue.line: I'm home. Sleeping. What's it to you?

dialogue.speaker: Rika
dialogue.line: Don't be like that! Guess what? There's this super exclusive party tonight! My cousin got us invites! It's going to be amazing, all the rich kids will be there!

dialogue.speaker: Shin-Ae
dialogue.line: Pass. I'm not into watching rich kids flaunt their parents' money. And I have nothing to wear.

dialogue.speaker: Rika
dialogue.line: Nonsense! I'll pick out something for you! We HAVE to go! It's a chance to meet someone rich and handsome!

dialogue.speaker: Shin-Ae
dialogue.line: (Thought) 'Rich and handsome.' Yeah, because that's what I need. Another problem.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: An hour later, I found myself being shoved into a dress that was definitely not my style, and dragged to a mansion that screamed 'old money.'

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CHIC MUSIC, CHATTER

dialogue.speaker: Shin-Ae
dialogue.line: (Thought) This is hell. Everyone's dressed like they're going to a fashion show. I just want a burger.

dialogue.speaker: Rika
dialogue.line: Shin-Ae, try to mingle! Don't just stand there by the food table!

dialogue.speaker: Shin-Ae
dialogue.line: The food table is the only reason I'm here. Besides, I'm starving.

dialogue.speaker: Shin-Ae
dialogue.line: (Thought) Finally, some orange juice. Maybe I can chug this and make my escape.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLINK

dialogue.speaker: Shin-Ae
dialogue.line: Whoa!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SPLASH

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: In my haste, I bumped into someone. Hard. And the entire glass of orange juice went flying.

dialogue.speaker: Shin-Ae
dialogue.line: (Thought) Oh, crap. It's on his ridiculously expensive-looking suit. And he's staring at me like I just murdered his pet unicorn.

dialogue.speaker: Shin-Ae
dialogue.line: Oh, my bad. Uh... sorry.

dialogue.speaker: Kousuke
dialogue.line: Do you have any idea how much this suit costs?

dialogue.speaker: Shin-Ae
dialogue.line: No, and frankly, I don't care. It's just juice. It'll wash out.

dialogue.speaker: Kousuke
dialogue.line: You are incredibly rude. And you're making a scene.

dialogue.speaker: Shin-Ae
dialogue.line: I'm making a scene? You're the one glaring at me like I personally offended your ancestors. Just tell me how much I owe you, and I'll pay you back. Eventually.

dialogue.speaker: Kousuke
dialogue.line: You can start by leaving. Now.

dialogue.speaker: Shin-Ae
dialogue.line: (Thought) Fine by me. This party sucked anyway.

dialogue.speaker: Shin-Ae
dialogue.line: Gladly. And next time, try not to stand so close to the buffet if you don't want to get stained.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: STOMP

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I stormed out, the stares of the 'elite' burning into my back. Just my luck. Another perfect day, perfectly ruined.

summary: Shin-Ae, a cynical and financially struggling high schooler, is reluctantly dragged to an exclusive formal party by her friend Rika. While trying to grab some food, she accidentally spills orange juice on a cold, arrogant man named Kousuke Hirahara, leading to a heated confrontation and her being kicked out.
